issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios such as payment failures or network issues during upgrade.

scenarios.name: SVG export feature gate redesign
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies value-first timing (after 3 designs), full paywall components (preview, social proof, annual-default pricing, escape hatch), and trigger A/B tests; baseline lists generic CRO tips without the value-first trigger rule or annual-default display.

scenarios.name: 14-day CRM trial expiration flow
scenarios.rationale: Treatment proposes a multi-touch sequence (Day 7/11/13/14) with personalized usage summaries, read-only takeover, and activity-based extension/discount offers; baseline lists standard reminder emails without escape hatches or activity-tiered offers.
